title: Day 8 Daily Test — Will Have (30 Questions)

questions.hindi: कल तक, मैं report खत्म कर चुका होऊँगा।
options: By tomorrow, I will finish the report.
By tomorrow, I will have finished the report.
By tomorrow, I have finished the report.
By tomorrow, I had finished the report.
questions.answer: By tomorrow, I will have finished the report.

questions.sentence: She will has completed the course.
questions.correct: She will have completed the course.
options: She will has completed the course.
She will have completed the course.
She will completed the course.
She has will complete the course.
questions.answer: She will have completed the course.

questions.hindi: अगले साल तक, वह अपनी MBA पूरी कर चुकी होगी।
options: By next year, she will complete her MBA.
By next year, she will have completed her MBA.
By next year, she has completed her MBA.
By next year, she completed her MBA.
questions.answer: By next year, she will have completed her MBA.

questions.correct: By tomorrow I will have finished.
options: By tomorrow I will finished.
By tomorrow I will have finished.
By tomorrow I have finished.
By tomorrow I will finish.
questions.answer: By tomorrow I will have finished.
questions.explanation: 'have' नहीं छोड़ सकते Future Perfect में।

questions.hindi: 5 बजे तक, हम office से निकल चुके होंगे।
options: By 5 PM, we will leave the office.
By 5 PM, we will have left the office.
By 5 PM, we have left the office.
By 5 PM, we left the office.
questions.answer: By 5 PM, we will have left the office.

questions.hindi: By Friday, I will _____ finished the report.
options: has
have
had
having
questions.answer: have
questions.explanation: 'will' के बाद हमेशा base form 'have' आता है।

questions.hindi: मैं तब तक खत्म नहीं कर पाऊँगा।
options: I won't finish by then.
I won't have finished by then.
I haven't finished by then.
I don't have finished by then.
questions.answer: I won't have finished by then.
questions.explanation: Negative Future Perfect: won't have + V3।

questions.hindi: क्या तुम Friday तक assignment पूरा कर लोगे?
options: Will you complete the assignment by Friday?
Will you have completed the assignment by Friday?
Do you have completed the assignment by Friday?
Have you completed the assignment by Friday?
questions.answer: Will you have completed the assignment by Friday?
questions.explanation: Question form: Will + subject + have + V3?

questions.hindi: 2030 तक, technology बहुत बदल चुकी होगी।
options: By 2030, technology will change a lot.
By 2030, technology will have changed a lot.
By 2030, technology has changed a lot.
By 2030, technology changed a lot.
questions.answer: By 2030, technology will have changed a lot.

questions.sentence: By tomorrow I will have finish.
questions.correct: By tomorrow I will have finished.
options: By tomorrow I will have finish.
By tomorrow I will have finished.
By tomorrow I have finish.
By tomorrow I will finished.
questions.answer: By tomorrow I will have finished.
questions.explanation: V3 form ज़रूरी है, base verb नहीं।

questions.hindi: जब तक तुम यह पढ़ोगे, मैं जा चुका होऊँगा।
options: By the time you read this, I leave.
By the time you read this, I will have left.
By the time you read this, I have left.
By the time you read this, I left.
questions.answer: By the time you read this, I will have left.
questions.explanation: 'By the time' common Future Perfect marker।

questions.hindi: Friday तक, मैं testing phase पूरा कर चुका होऊँगा।
options: By Friday, I will complete the testing phase.
By Friday, I will have completed the testing phase.
By Friday, I have completed the testing phase.
By Friday, I completed the testing phase.
questions.answer: By Friday, I will have completed the testing phase.

questions.hindi: December तक, मैं अपनी trip के लिए पर्याप्त पैसे बचा चुका होऊँगा।
options: By December, I will save enough for my trip.
By December, I will have saved enough for my trip.
By December, I have saved enough for my trip.
By December, I saved enough for my trip.
questions.answer: By December, I will have saved enough for my trip.

questions.hindi: By Q4, our company will have _____ its revenue target.
options: reach
reaches
reached
reaching
questions.answer: reached
questions.explanation: V3 form ज़रूरी है after 'will have'।

questions.hindi: March तक, नए office का निर्माण हो चुका होगा।
options: By March, the new office will be built.
By March, the new office will have been built.
By March, the new office has been built.
By March, the new office was built.
questions.answer: By March, the new office will have been built.
questions.explanation: Passive Future Perfect: will have been + V3।

questions.hindi: मैं deadline से पहले proposal भेज चुका होऊँगा।
options: I will send the proposal before the deadline.
I will have sent the proposal before the deadline.
I have sent the proposal before the deadline.
I sent the proposal before the deadline.
questions.answer: I will have sent the proposal before the deadline.

questions.hindi: 2040 तक, electric vehicles ने petrol cars को बदल दिया होगा।
options: By 2040, electric vehicles will replace petrol cars.
By 2040, electric vehicles will have replaced petrol cars.
By 2040, electric vehicles have replaced petrol cars.
By 2040, electric vehicles replaced petrol cars.
questions.answer: By 2040, electric vehicles will have replaced petrol cars.

questions.sentence: Will you completed the report by Friday?
questions.correct: Will you have completed the report by Friday?
options: Will you completed the report by Friday?
Will you have completed the report by Friday?
Have you completed the report by Friday?
Do you complete the report by Friday?
questions.answer: Will you have completed the report by Friday?
questions.explanation: 'have' नहीं छोड़ सकते question में भी।

questions.hindi: 5 सालों में, मैं senior manager बन चुका होऊँगा।
options: In 5 years, I will become a senior manager.
In 5 years, I will have become a senior manager.
In 5 years, I have become a senior manager.
In 5 years, I became a senior manager.
questions.answer: In 5 years, I will have become a senior manager.

questions.hindi: By the time the boss arrives, all the work will have been _____.
options: done
doing
do
does
questions.answer: done

questions.hindi: Monday तक, developers ने update deploy कर दिया होगा।
options: By Monday, the developers will deploy the update.
By Monday, the developers will have deployed the update.
By Monday, the developers have deployed the update.
By Monday, the developers deployed the update.
questions.answer: By Monday, the developers will have deployed the update.

questions.hindi: साल के अंत तक, हमने sales target पार कर लिया होगा।
options: By year-end, we will exceed our sales target.
By year-end, we will have exceeded our sales target.
By year-end, we have exceeded our sales target.
By year-end, we exceeded our sales target.
questions.answer: By year-end, we will have exceeded our sales target.

questions.hindi: 60 की उम्र तक, वह retire हो चुका होगा।
options: By 60, he will retire.
By 60, he will have retired.
By 60, he has retired.
By 60, he retired.
questions.answer: By 60, he will have retired.

questions.hindi: अगले साल तक, हम अपने नए घर में settle हो चुके होंगे।
options: By next year, we will settle in our new home.
By next year, we will have settled in our new home.
By next year, we have settled in our new home.
By next year, we settled in our new home.
questions.answer: By next year, we will have settled in our new home.

questions.sentence: By next month we will upgraded our systems.
questions.correct: By next month we will have upgraded our systems.
options: By next month we will upgraded our systems.
By next month we will have upgraded our systems.
By next month we have upgraded our systems.
By next month we upgraded our systems.
questions.answer: By next month we will have upgraded our systems.
questions.explanation: 'have' missing करने से error बनता है।

questions.hindi: अंततः, मैं अपना goal achieve कर चुका होऊँगा।
options: Eventually, I will achieve my goal.
Eventually, I will have achieved my goal.
Eventually, I have achieved my goal.
Eventually, I achieved my goal.
questions.answer: Eventually, I will have achieved my goal.

questions.hindi: By March, हमने funding secure कर लिया होगा।
options: By March, we will secure funding.
By March, we will have secured funding.
By March, we have secured funding.
By March, we secured funding.
questions.answer: By March, we will have secured funding.

questions.hindi: By June, I will have become _____ in Python.
options: proficient
proficiency
proficiently
proficients
questions.answer: proficient

questions.hindi: अगले हफ्ते तक, हमने पहला milestone हासिल कर लिया होगा।
options: By next week, we will reach the first milestone.
By next week, we will have reached the first milestone.
By next week, we have reached the first milestone.
By next week, we reached the first milestone.
questions.answer: By next week, we will have reached the first milestone.

questions.hindi: क्या company ने Q4 तक target पूरा कर लिया होगा?
options: Will the company reach its target by Q4?
Will the company have reached its target by Q4?
Does the company reach its target by Q4?
Has the company reached its target by Q4?
questions.answer: Will the company have reached its target by Q4?
